meta.title: Asociación Hechos — Free courses, jobs & community for migrants
meta.description: Learn with free courses, find job openings and join a community that supports you. Asociación Hechos' free platform for migrants and job seekers. Available in Spanish and English.

hero.subtitle: Starting over shouldn't mean starting alone. Free courses, job openings and a community that supports you — in your language.
hero.micro: No cost · Spanish & English · Under a minute

problem.title: Finding opportunities shouldn't feel like a maze
problem.card1Body: Courses, aid and contacts spread across a thousand different sites.
problem.card2Body: Job openings circulate through chains and groups that vanish in minutes.
problem.card3Body: No follow-up, no way to know if you're really making progress.

solution.title: One place. Three paths.
solution.subtitle: Hechos brings learning, jobs and community together in a platform built for you.

benefits.title: What you get by joining
benefits.item1Body: Courses and videos at your own pace, never a cost.
benefits.item2Body: Real job postings, shared by the community.
benefits.item3Body: Instant alert for every new job opening.
benefits.item4Body: Pick your courses back up exactly where you left off.
benefits.item5Body: Questions answered by people who've been there.
benefits.item6Body: The whole platform available in Spanish and English.

employment.title: Openings posted this week
employment.bannerTitle: Want us to notify you of every new opening?
employment.bannerCta: Create an account and turn on alerts

community.title: People who've already been where you are
community.post1Quote: Does anyone know how to get my degree recognized here?
community.post2Quote: Sharing my experience with the residency process…
community.post3Quote: Thanks to this community I found my first job here.

about.title: Who we are
about.body: Asociación Hechos supports migrants and job seekers. This platform is the digital extension of that work: same commitment, now a click away.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How much does the platform cost?
faq.a1: Nothing. Hechos is and will always be free for the people who use it.
faq.q2: Do I need documents to sign up?
faq.a2: Just an email address. We don't ask for immigration status or documents to create your account.
faq.q3: Can I use the platform in English?
faq.a3: Yes. The whole platform is available in Spanish and English from day one.
faq.a4: Registered users and the association's team. Every posting is moderated before it goes live.
faq.q5: What happens with my personal data?
faq.a5: It's stored encrypted and never shared or sold to third parties.
faq.a6: Not yet, but it's a feature we're preparing for an upcoming version.

ctaFinal.title: Your next opportunity starts here
ctaFinal.micro: Free · In your language · Under a minute

footer.tagline: Learning, jobs and community for those starting over.
